chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 787 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.3507/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 15-10-2025 M/s Achar Khan Gabol and Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocates for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with Syed Wafa Hassan Shah, Assistant Director (Litigation) on behalf of Regional Directorate Colleges, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that for redressal of his grievance the petitioner will approach the Service Tribunal. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
